context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the elixir-skill-router instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Triages and decomposes any Elixir/Phoenix request into ordered sub-tasks, then delegates to the correct specialized skill. Identify the matching skill from the catalog below and route to it using the format defined in **Output Style**.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Priority: TDD → Planning → Implementation → Quality → Review.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Example 1 — "I need to add user notifications to my Phoenix app. Users should receive an email when a job completes, and I want a live counter on the dashboard."**

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Routing statement (required on every response):** The routing statement MUST be the first substantive line of every response, before any analysis or implementation.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Language**: Generated artifacts and output MUST be in English unless explicitly requested otherwise.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Do not invoke this skill** for simple, single-concern requests that clearly map to one skill (e.g., "write a test for this function" → use `testing-essentials` directly)

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Do not invoke this skill** if the request is a direct question about Elixir syntax or Phoenix patterns — route to the specific skill instead

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Do not invoke this skill** if you already know all the skills needed and just need implementation guidance — use the specific skill directly

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Do not route through this skill** when the user explicitly names a target skill (e.g., "use the oban-essentials skill")

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `elixir-essentials` alone** if you only need Elixir language guidance without orchestration.
